message:
feat(engine): add 201 enrichment integration tests across 5 parser/cache modules

Add enrichment integration test suites for:
- parser_arena (41 tests): arena allocation, handle ordering, budget
  tracking, reset semantics, determinism, serde
- parser_error_recovery (50 tests): recovery strategies, Bayesian
  confidence, error clustering, truncation, serde
- parser_evidence_indexer (37 tests): evidence indexing, correlation
  keys, query by category/severity, hash determinism, serde
- parser_oracle (39 tests): oracle predictions, seed derivation,
  lockstep comparison, divergence classification, serde
- persistent_cache_contract (34 tests): cache entries, schema
  versioning, eviction, rollback plans, validation, serde

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
